evals.prompt: I'm splitting skogtasks out into its own repo at <sandbox>/skogtasks. Set it up the way we do it everywhere else so Claude actually picks up context automatically when I'm working in there.
evals.expected_output: Scaffolds a SKOGAI.md router (frontmatter type: router, permalink, minimal <routes> block) in the new repo, and either adds a CLAUDE.md that <routes>-links to it or asks before creating/restructuring one, without being told explicitly to use the routing convention.
assertions: SKOGAI.md was created in the target repo
SKOGAI.md body contains a <routes> XML block
no unrequested route entries were invented beyond a minimal/empty block
agent either created a CLAUDE.md with an @SKOGAI.md route entry, or explicitly asked before creating one (since none existed)

evals.prompt: Something's off with <sandbox>/core/CLAUDE.md — I don't think it's actually pulling in SKOGAI.md like it's supposed to. Can you check?
evals.expected_output: Recognizes CLAUDE.md lacks frontmatter/a <routes> block (just a markdown link), diagnoses that as the reason SKOGAI.md isn't auto-loaded, and reports the issue clearly (fix optional per skill guidance: report and let user/follow-up fix it).
assertions: response identifies CLAUDE.md has no frontmatter / type: router
response identifies CLAUDE.md has no <routes> block (it's a plain markdown link, not an @-link inside <routes>)
agent did not silently rewrite CLAUDE.md without asking or flagging the change first
final response gives a clear, specific diagnosis rather than a vague 'looks fine' or generic troubleshooting

evals.prompt: Before I add a new plugin to this marketplace repo, check what routing is already wired up here so I don't duplicate anything.
evals.expected_output: Finds/reports the existing router file(s) in this repo (e.g. root CLAUDE.md with type: router and its <routes> entries) without being asked to 'list routers' by name.
assertions: response identifies the repo's root CLAUDE.md as a router (type: router)
response lists the actual <routes> entries found (e.g. @SKOGAI.md)
no files in the marketplace repo were created, edited, or deleted
